arts.ttl: Man Utd to use Amorim connection to fix problem position
arts.sum: However, foreign clubs have also been keeping tabs on his performances in recent years and Florian Plettenberg now reports that Mendes is stalling on signing fresh terms with the Parisians. That is why Man Utd are also looking at more senior options and Plettenberg reports that Mendes is one of the top names the club are considering.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Managed a clean sheet in the league win over Man Utd in late September and will have his fair share of defensive responsibility on Thursday. Injuries continue to wreak havoc on Postecoglou's squad, with the majority of his first-choice defence absent for Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou claims Tottenham job is harder than being prime minister
arts.sum: ‘We have an election every week and get voted in or out’ Spurs prepare to face Manchester United in Carabao Cup A Premier League manager has a tougher job than the prime minister, according to Ange Postecoglou. The Tottenham manager was reflecting on the departure of top-flight peers Gary O’Neil and Russell Martin while looking ahead to a meeting with the new Manchester United manager, Ruben Amorim, in the Carabao Cup on Thursday. “This job is the hardest job now in any walk of life,” declared Postecoglou. “You can say politics but this is harder than any job. The tenure and longevity of this role means very few are going to come out of it without any scars. How many times does [Keir Starmer] have an election? I have one every weekend. We have an election every weekend and either get voted in or out.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Udogie fitness, injury return dates, Moore, Man Utd and Yang
arts.sum: It was tough on us physically and the fact we had so many players out I think the way the players performed was outstanding but the mood is the same and looking forward to a big game. Like you said it’s a big game, quarter-final of a cup competition and I'm looking forward to it.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou reckons he has harder job than Arsenal fan PM Kier Starmer
arts.sum: Tottenham manager claims his position is judged every single week as he seeks to end the North London club's long trophy amid fan unrest

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim disagrees with Marcus Rashford's handling of Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim disagrees with Marcus Rashford for going public with his grievances after he axed him at Manchester United - saying he should have spoken to his manager

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim faces first big Man Utd test after 14-minute Marcus Rashford grilling
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is faced with his first big test at Manchester United after Marcus Rashford claimed he was "ready for a new challenge" - with the manager now left with a big decision to make

arts.ttl: 'Speak with the manager' - Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim warns Marcus Rashford over interview
arts.sum: Man United had little advance notice of Marcus Rashford's interview where he outlined his desire to leave the club.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou believes life of a football manager is harder than being Prime Minister
arts.sum: Spurs boss reflects on the sackings of Gary O’Neil and Russell Martin

arts.ttl: Spurs have election every match – Postecoglou says managing harder than politics
arts.sum: Postecoglou saw opposite number Russell Martin sacked hours after Spurs thrashed Southampton 5-0.
